settings.title: Settings
settings.headerSubtitle: Appearance, runtime, and local data configuration.

view.cardInteractionDesc: Customize single-click and double-click behavior for cards in card view.
view.clickActionDesc: Action triggered by single-clicking a card. Set to "None" to disable.
view.doubleClickActionDesc: Action triggered by double-clicking a card. Set to "None" to disable.

componentDisplay.title: Component display
componentDisplay.description: Choose a shared visual treatment for tab navigation. It changes appearance only; tab semantics and keyboard behavior remain Radix Tabs.
componentDisplay.previewHint: This is the same shared component used by node result tabs.
componentDisplay.historyHint: Changing the display type never changes tab content or actions.
componentDisplay.detailsHint: Other component preferences can be added here without changing node implementations.

switches.title: Switches
switches.description: The outlined default keeps an unchecked switch visible on every theme.

data.title: Local data
data.description: Workspace persistence and database configuration belong to the local backend service.
data.nextDescription: The frontend now has a dedicated data section. A real path picker should be wired after the Elysia backend exposes current database path and update APIs.

colorMode.label: COLOR MODE
colorMode.description: Switching theme preset applies its preferred default mode. Override it here.

liquidGlass.title: LIQUID GLASS
liquidGlass.description: Apply a library-backed glass material across nodes, panels, menus, and workspace chrome.

language.label: LANGUAGE
language.subtitle: Interface language
language.description: Choose the display language for the application interface.

background.title: Background Canvas
background.coverTopBarHint: Extend background image across the whole window; the top bar becomes transparent

atmospheric.title: Atmospheric Effects
atmospheric.vignetteDesc: Controls the peripheral darkness of the workspace canvas.
atmospheric.actionGlowDesc: Soft colored aura behind primary buttons
atmospheric.cardElevationDesc: Subtle top-border shine on elevated surfaces

chrome.title: Operation Bar
chrome.description: Shared floating action bar for cards and node views. Can be fully hidden, or adjust position and style to reduce obstruction.
chrome.visibleDesc: When off, the bar is not rendered (components can still be operated via the context menu)
chrome.positionDesc: Horizontal position of the bar on a card
chrome.styleDesc: Visual style of the bar, independent of position
chrome.styleTrafficLightDesc: macOS-style colored dots, always visible, icons on hover
chrome.islandCustomDesc: Tune the centered operation bar size, motion, and idle mark position.

spatial.label: Spatial Studio
spatial.subtitle: Active Preset
spatial.description: A clean light interface with forest green accents. Precision-focused, minimal cognitive load.

endfield.label: Endfield Tactical
endfield.subtitle: Dark Preset
endfield.description: A HUD-like, data-dense technical interface. Features deep slate foundations with vibrant Endfield Green highlights for precise operational contrast.

wuling.label: Wuling Jade Industrial
wuling.subtitle: Arknights Endfield
wuling.description: A jade industrial workspace inspired by Wuling's Endfield direction: cool laboratory surfaces, hard technical panels, Hanken Grotesk text, and JetBrains Mono data labels across light and dark modes.

onlook.label: Onlook Gradient Demo
onlook.subtitle: One Page Love source
onlook.description: Inspired by the Onlook entry: dark macOS product-demo staging, luminous ribbon gradients, soft translucent controls, and system-like product UI depth.

tori.label: Tori Terminal Modular
tori.subtitle: One Page Love source
tori.description: Inspired by Tori by TalkJS: blue-white terminal modules, squared shadcn/Tailwind surfaces, Menlo-style data labels, and crisp construction-line grids.

conductor.label: Conductor Agent Workbench
conductor.subtitle: One Page Love shadcn/ui source
conductor.description: Inspired by Conductor's parallel coding-agent workspace: dark mono panels, merge-ready green states, compact review columns, and terminal workbench controls carried into node interiors.

hilden.label: Hilden & Kaira Poster
hilden.subtitle: Awwwards SOTD source
hilden.description: Inspired by the Hilden & Kaira Awwwards Site of the Day: oversized black-and-white portfolio type, billboard framing, hard outlines, and poster-like contrast.

aperture.label: Project Aperture Archive
aperture.subtitle: Awwwards Honorable Mention
aperture.description: Inspired by Project Aperture's Awwwards Honorable Mention: a dark travel-photography room, vertical contact-sheet rhythm, viewfinder corners, soft photographic whites, and cinematic gallery controls across every node.

noomo.label: Noomo 3D Agency
noomo.subtitle: Public agency site source
noomo.description: Inspired by Noomo Agency: pale blue cinematic space, huge uppercase display typography, restrained navigation, and floating white 3D block forms translated into workspace surfaces.

excalidraw.label: Excalidraw Sketch
excalidraw.subtitle: Open-source 127k-star source
excalidraw.description: Inspired by the open-source Excalidraw app: hand-drawn whiteboard surfaces, Excalifont-style typography, pale tool chips, violet active states, and rough diagram strokes.

astro.label: Astro Cosmic Framework
astro.subtitle: Open-source site source
astro.description: Inspired by the open-source Astro website: dark cosmic gradients, orange-violet glow, high-contrast framework docs, and luminous code-panel controls translated across workspace nodes.

svelte.label: Svelte Editorial
svelte.subtitle: Open-source 87k-star source
svelte.description: Inspired by the open-source Svelte website: warm paper surfaces, serif editorial rhythm, crisp black text, and vivid orange action controls carried into every node surface.

bun.label: Bun Runtime Toolkit
bun.subtitle: Open-source 93k-star source
bun.description: Inspired by the open-source Bun website: dark JavaScript runtime staging, warm amber highlights, dense release-feed rhythm, and terminal toolkit controls across node internals.

storybook.label: Storybook Workshop
storybook.subtitle: Open-source 90k-star source
storybook.description: Inspired by Storybook's open-source UI workshop: bright docs canvas, blue navigation, pink addon accents, rounded controls, and component-lab surfaces carried into node interiors.

supabase.label: Supabase Postgres
supabase.subtitle: Open-source 106k-star source
supabase.description: Inspired by Supabase's open-source Postgres platform: near-white docs canvas, graphite chrome, mint action controls, SQL editor chips, and database table surfaces across node interiors.

penpot.label: Penpot Design Canvas
penpot.subtitle: Open-source 55k-star source
penpot.description: Inspired by Penpot's open-source design platform: deep indigo canvas, Work Sans interface type, teal primary actions, green collaboration states, and purple vector inspector accents inside every node.

vite.label: Vite Dev Server
vite.subtitle: Open-source 81k-star source
vite.description: Inspired by Vite's open-source build-tool site: dark developer-stage canvas, purple-blue hero glow, yellow lightning accents, and fast docs/code controls carried into node interiors.

developerRuntime.title: Developer Runtime
developerRuntime.description: Inspect the frontend source and local backend used by the desktop shell. Wails dev proxy is selected at startup, so it is not a hot runtime toggle.
developerRuntime.hotSwitchHint: During development, run bun run dev first, then bun run dev:desktop:attach to make the desktop shell attach to the existing Vite/Elysia ports. Use bun run dev:desktop when you want one command to start everything.

backendBanner.missingConfig: Local Backend is not configured, so workspace and node execution are paused.
backendBanner.unreachable: Local Backend is unreachable: {{url}}. Workspace and node execution are paused.

registry.title: Module library
registry.subtitle: Drag a module into the current view, or deploy it directly.

help.title: Node help
help.description: Shared UI and CLI usage notes.
help.missingDescription: This module does not expose shared node help yet.

dashboard.title: Runtime Intelligence Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track operation history, backend stability, node execution volume, and active workspace composition in one analytic cockpit.

charts.activityDesc: Daily success, failure, and info events from runtime history.
charts.stabilityDesc: Composite score from backend health, success rate, and active operation errors.
charts.statusDesc: Terminal operation outcomes across the selected time window.
charts.nodeUsageDesc: Most frequently executed or deployed nodes in the workspace.
charts.durationDesc: Average node run duration by day.

live.title: Live operation feed
live.description: Recent node phases and messages currently tracked in memory.

history.title: Recent operation history
history.description: Latest persisted runtime records for audit and debugging.
history.empty: No operation history in this range.

categories.title: Node categories
categories.description: Workspace node mix grouped by registry category.

cards.emptyHint: Deploy modules from the registry to populate this workspace.

lane.empty: // no lanes — create one to start

bento.emptyHint: Drop modules into a resizable workspace grid.

operations.title: Node operations
operations.subtitle: Live backend node runs, recent results, and stream events.
operations.empty: No node operations have run in this session.

history.title: Run history
history.subtitle: Saved node runs and key runtime operations.
history.emptyHint: Run any node and a parameter snapshot will be saved automatically.
history.noHistoryHint: Run this node to save history.

contextMenu.clearDataConfirmDescription: This removes all stored data for this component. This cannot be undone.
contextMenu.deleteConfirmDescription: This removes the component from the workspace.
contextMenu.deleteDuplicatesConfirmDescription: This removes all cards of the same module type ({{count}} total), including the current one. This cannot be undone.
contextMenu.deleteLaneConfirmDescription: This removes the lane and its card ordering. This cannot be undone.

scratch.name: SCRATCH
scratch.description: Ephemeral text buffer. Temporary storage for quick notes, variables, or copy-paste ops.

counter.name: COUNTER
counter.description: Incremental tracking node. Stateful integer tracking with broadcast capabilities.

acidMixer.name: ACID MIXER
acidMixer.description: Compound synthesizer logic board. Combine distinct data streams to generate new outputs.

terminal.name: TERMINAL
terminal.description: Command line interface node. Direct execution access to core system services.

tasks.name: TASKS
tasks.description: Linear objective tracker. Sequential list management for operator workflows.

defaults.task2: Deploy core modules to active canvas

clock.name: CLOCK
clock.description: Global/Local temporal reference. High-precision sync with central server time.

calculator.name: CALCULATOR
calculator.description: Arithmetic processing unit. Essential localized computation and conversion tool.

kanban.name: KANBAN BOARD
kanban.description: Agile workflow visualization. Drag-and-drop state management for complex operations.

database.name: DATABASE
database.description: Notion-style table view: collects metadata of all components (module/state/visibility/tags/time), supports sorting, filtering, inline editing.

blocknote.name: BLOCKNOTE
blocknote.description: BlockNote rich text editor based on shadcn. Block-level document editing, drag-and-drop reordering, slash menu, styles follow project theme automatically.

settings.name: SETTINGS
settings.description: Universal project settings: appearance, background, runtime, and local data configuration.

module-registry.name: MODULE REGISTRY
module-registry.description: Browse, search, and deploy all available modules into the workspace.

node-history.name: RUN HISTORY
node-history.description: Runtime history of node, workspace, config, and system events with filtering.

node-operations.name: NODE OPERATIONS
node-operations.description: Live backend node runs: active, recent, and finished operations with stream events.

classify.previewDescription: Build the current move or copy plan without changing files.

switches.enableSimilarityDescription: Compares parent and child names, skipping items below the selected similarity threshold.

nested.description: Lifts contents from a single nested subfolder and removes the empty shell.

media.label: Single-media dissolve

archive.label: Single-archive dissolve
archive.description: Lifts one archive file from its folder and removes the empty shell.

trename.name: Trename
trename.description: Scan folders into rename JSON, validate translated targets, rename, and undo.
trename.title: trename
trename.readyToScan: Ready to scan folders into rename JSON.

desc.idle: Paste directories and scan into rename JSON.
desc.running: Trename is processing the current task.
desc.error: Last task failed, check conflicts and logs.

labels.inputHint: Paste directories, scan into rename JSON; edit large JSON in the dialog.

confirm.title: Confirm live Trename?

summary.empty: Select directories then scan rename JSON

audiov.name: AudioV
audiov.description: Extract audio tracks from video files using the built-in ffmpeg profile.

status.label: Check ffmpeg
status.description: Check whether ffmpeg is available locally.

plan.label: Generate plan
plan.description: Generate the fixed AAC / M4A extraction plan without writing files.

run.label: Extract audio
run.description: Extract the first audio stream from each video with the built-in AAC / M4A profile.

statusDesc.idle: Choose an action to inspect the profile, preview extraction, or extract audio.
statusDesc.running: AudioV is generating ffmpeg commands or extracting audio.
statusDesc.error: The previous task failed. Check the log.

execution.previewDescription: Generate commands and output paths without changing files.
execution.liveDescription: Write audio files with the fixed AAC / M4A profile.

paths.title: Video paths
paths.placeholder:
Paste video file paths, for example:
D:/Video/clip1.mp4
D:/Video/clip2.mkv

command.title: Command preview
command.label: Label
command.emptyDescription: Generate a plan to show the audio extraction command.

confirm.title: Extract audio?
confirm.description: Preview is off. AudioV will write audio files using the built-in AAC / M4A profile. Confirm the video paths and destination directory before continuing.

defaults.title: Default settings
defaults.dialogDescription: Current nodes.audiov defaults and the settings file location.

error.pathRequired: Enter at least one video file path first.
error.noRunEnv: This environment cannot run nodes locally. Use desktop mode or the CLI.

coveru.name: CoverU
coveru.description: Find and extract cover images from archives, image files, or directories.

scan.label: Scan covers
scan.description: Read the paths and identify possible cover candidates without writing files.

plan.label: Generate plan
plan.description: Calculate output locations, conflicts, and unsupported archives.

extract.label: Extract covers
extract.description: Write cover files from the plan; preview remains on by default.

paths.label: Archives, images, or directories
paths.placeholder:
One ZIP/CBZ, image, or directory per line
D:/archives/book.zip

outputDir.label: Output directory
outputDir.placeholder: Leave blank to write beside the archive

statusDesc.idle: Enter archives, images, or directories to scan for covers.
statusDesc.running: CoverU is scanning or extracting covers.
statusDesc.error: The previous task failed. Check the issues list.

confirm.title: Extract covers?
confirm.description: This will write cover files. Confirm the output directory and overwrite policy; unsupported archives will be skipped.

empty.candidates: Enter archives to show cover candidates.
empty.results: Run the workflow to show candidates and output paths.

error.pathRequired: Enter at least one archive, image, or directory path first.
error.noRunEnv: This environment cannot run nodes locally. Use desktop mode or the CLI.
